nasb.text: Joab sent messengers to David and said, “I have fought against Rabbah, I have even captured the city of waters.

esv.text: And Joab sent messengers to David and said, “I have fought against Rabbah; moreover, I have taken the city of waters.

cnv.text: 約押派遣使者去見大衛，說：“我攻打拉巴，已經攻取了水城。

ccb.text: 他派人去向大卫禀告说：“我攻打拉巴，已经占领了城的水源。
